title: The Alaska Music Podcast Christmas Special - Episode 1
summary: It's Christmas! Enjoy a selection of Alaskan artists performing classic Christmas music. Happy Holidays from everyone in the Last Frontier.

title: Landless Legislation Bills Introduced by   Alaska’s Congressional Delegation
summary: Today, Alaska Republican Senators Lisa Murkowski and Dan Sullivan introduced a companion bill to Rep. Don Young’s House Bill 3231, which, if adopted would resolve 50 years of injustice for five landless communities in Southeast Alaska. title: Sealaska Supports Ballot Initiative to  Formally Recognize All 229 Alaska Native Tribes
summary: Sealaska recently joined Alaskans for Better Government in support of a proposed ballot measure to institute formal legal recognition of all 229 Alaska Native Tribes by the State of Alaska. This ballot initiative would provide Alaskans – rather than the Legislature – a chance to vote on the matter d...

title: Iceland: Committed to Sustainability   for the Whole Marine Ecosystem
summary: Sealaska announced in October that it has plans to acquire equity in two leading Icelandic seafood companies – IceMar and AG Seafood.
